format_payload_function.title: [Allianz][Assessorias][Função para formatar o payload]
format_payload_function.function:
return {
    optional_config: {
        ...workflowProtocol?.optional_config,
        pendency_button: {
            clerk: true,
            person: true,
            seller: true,
            company: true,
            backoffice: true,
            provider: true,
            advisor: true,
            broker_frotas: true,
            advisor_piloto: true,
            corretor_piloto: true,
            broker: true,
        },
        reopen_protocol_button: {
            assessor: true,
            clerk: true,
            broker: true,
            person: true,
            seller: true,
            company: true,
            backoffice: true,
            provider: true,
            advisor: true,
            backoffice_financeiro: true,
            operator: true
        }
    }
}
